semantic.role: Pull request template for ArchSpine project contributions
responsibilities: Defining required sections for PR descriptions: Summary, Motivation, Testing, Docs impact
Ensuring consistent and comprehensive change documentation

English.purpose: This document is a standardized pull request template designed to guide contributors in describing their changes to the ArchSpine project.
English.context_and_audience: It is intended for all developers contributing to ArchSpine, including both human maintainers and AI agents, to ensure that every pull request includes clear motivation, testing evidence, and documentation impact assessment.
key_takeaways: Every PR must include a summary and motivation.
Testing checklist ensures changes are verified.
Documentation impact must be assessed and indicated.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文件是一个标准化的拉取请求模板，旨在引导贡献者描述其对 ArchSpine 项目的更改。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于所有向 ArchSpine 贡献的开发者，包括人类维护者和 AI 代理，确保每个拉取请求都包含清晰的动机、测试证据和文档影响评估。
key_takeaways: 每个 PR 必须包含摘要和动机。
测试清单确保更改经过验证。
必须评估并指明文档影响。
